'''Croig Jacamden''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] and the owner of [[Croig's Fix-It Barn]] in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Hweg Shul]] on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]]. While on Nam Chorios in a search quest for [[Callista Ming]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] took up work as a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] at the Fix-It Barn for a short time. Jacamden also had a sibling living in Hweg Shul.
